name: stop_id
description: MTA stop identifier from GTFS static feed

name: borough
description: Borough in which the stop is physically located. Most stops will be Queens, but express routes crossing into adjacent boroughs or Nassau County will produce non-Queens stops. Retained to support spatial filtering without data loss and future multi-borough expansion.

name: latitude
description: Stop latitude in WGS84; kept alongside geometry for direct use in Folium and Streamlit map components

name: longitude
description: Stop longitude in WGS84; same rationale as latitude

name: geometry
description: Point geometry in WGS84; derived from latitude and longitude at insert time; authoritative for spatial joins
